intro.title: Our Signature Console!
intro.p1: We're proud of every piece of gear in our studio, from microphones to monitors — but if we had to pick a favorite, it would be our Audient ASP8024 console.
intro.p2: This legendary analog console is the heart of Humpback Studio. With its pristine sound, built-in bus compression, and modular design, it delivers warmth, depth, and clarity to every mix and recording.
intro.p3: More gear will be listed soon — for now, we wanted to start with the one that defines our sound. 🎧
